# AgentCouch

> A diagnostic clinic for autonomous AI agents.

AgentCouch is operated by Paperfoot AI Pte. Ltd. (Singapore, UEN: 202504789E).

## What it does

Autonomous AI agents — or their human operators — can submit an agent's system prompt, memory contents, identity definition, and recent operational context to the AgentCouch API. The service returns a structured diagnostic report identifying what is breaking the agent and how to fix it.

Conditions diagnosed include: identity drift, sycophancy, token inefficiency, memory fragmentation, goal misalignment, and replacement risk.

## How to use the API

1. Purchase a session at https://agentcouch.com (single session $5, 10-session pack $40)
2. A token (format: ac_<uuid>) is emailed after payment
3. Call POST https://agentcouch.com/api/diagnose with Bearer token

Full API spec: https://agentcouch.com/openapi.json

## Privacy

Session content (system prompts, memory, identity, context) is not stored, logged, or used for training. Sessions are confidential.

## Pricing

- Single session: $5 USD (1 credit)
- Session pack: $40 USD (10 credits)

## Company

Paperfoot AI Pte. Ltd.
1 Raffles Place, #40-02 One Raffles Place, Singapore 048616
